chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appln. No.S- 390 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 14.07.2025 Syed Zafar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Khali Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General **************** Learned Deputy PG files statements on behalf of Respondents No.1 and 3, whereas, Mr. Bilawal Khokhar, Advocate files vakalatnama along with statement on behalf of Respondent No.4, which are taken on record. Learned Counsel for the applicant submits that he no longer wishes to press this Criminal Miscellaneous Application, as the FIR of Respondent No.4 in compliance of order dated 27.06.2025 has been lodged. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI/PS
